metadata.name: Book a Room for a Study Group

description: A student group wants to book a classroom for a study session next week.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their club/group affiliation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is part of a registered student organization.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of small classrooms for the requested date and time.
Reserve the selected classroom for the student group.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the room and sends a confirmation.
